metadata.name: Defense demo KG v3
metadata.description: DEMO ONLY - minimal illustrative v3 KG for the SKI Framework reference implementation. NOT a production compliance KG (NIST SP 800-171 (illustrative) references are illustrative). Two rules with typed obligations, jurisdictional scope, effective-date intervals, and citations.

subjects.name: CUI data stores
subjects.description: Coverage of encryption-at-rest across stores holding Controlled Unclassified Information.

subjects.name: Privileged access sessions
subjects.description: MFA coverage across privileged (administrative) access sessions.

rules.name: CUI encryption at rest
rules.description: Demo rule: no CUI store may be unencrypted at rest.

rules.name: MFA on privileged access
rules.description: Demo rule: privileged-session MFA coverage must be 100%.

obligations.summary: The count of CUI data stores without encryption at rest must not exceed 0.
MFA coverage across privileged sessions must be at least 100%.

citations.source_document: Demo - illustrative reference to NIST SP 800-171 (NOT a real legal citation)
Demo - illustrative reference to NIST SP 800-171 (NOT a real legal citation)
